use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and landing pages
Secondary action buttons with outline or ghost variants
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning confirmations
Icon buttons for compact toolbar or navigation actions
Link-style buttons for inline text navigation
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, supporting 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features standard accessibility focus states and hover transitions for interactive form and navigation elements.
